title: Line 41500 – Advanced Canada Workers Benefit (ACWB) - Canada.ca
content:
## Line 41500 – Advanced Canada workers benefit (ACWB)
If you received an RC210 slip for ACWB payments in 2025 , report the amounts on your Schedule 6 , Canada Workers Benefit .
If you have a spouse or common-law partner, the person claiming the basic Canada workers benefit (CWB) should report the amount from box 10 of all RC210 slips received for both of you.
If you and your spouse or common-law partner are not claiming the basic CWB , one of you must report the amount from box 10 of all RC210 slips as if you were claiming it.
For more information, go to Canada Workers Benefit . To view your RC210 slip or CWB information online, go to MyAccount.
If you are eligible to claim the CWB for 2025 , see line 45300 and complete Schedule 6 , Canada Workers Benefit .

## Completing your tax return
Enter the result from "Step 4 – Advanced Canada workers benefit (ACWB)" of Schedule 6 on line 41500 of your return.

## Forms and publications
- Line 45300 – Canada workers benefit (CWB)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
